llm_instruction: Use this file only after a candidate job was selected. Copy the BASF URL exactly from job.url; never construct job links.

job.title: Import-Export Customs Operations Internship
job.company: BASF Asia-Pacific Service Centre Sdn. Bhd.
job.description: The internship program is available all year long and here's what you can expect • A rewarding internship journey with tasks and projects that enable you to transfer your theoretical skills to a real business environment and gain exposure to diverse parts of the function e.g. supply chain, logistics, order management, etc. • You will be able to explore digital technologies such as robotics and automation, machine learning, predictive analytics, AI technologies with potential to improve operational effectiveness and efficiency • Collaborative and multicultural atmosphere where you are an essential team player to support colleagues and managers in a wide range projects and activities • Guidance, coaching and feedback from supervisors on performance which help you learn and shape your working style About The Role • Support in tracking shipment schedules and updating details in SAP. • Learn end to end shipment processes, Incoterms. to end shipment and customs operations. • Collect and verify key shipping documents and uploading using Power Automate. • Support in delivering automation effort across teams to simplify work processes • Participate in improvement initiatives discussion to work on improvement plans and timelines • Assist the team in tactical projects according to the objectives • Administrative management of import-export and customs activities • Prepare documentation of standard order management tasks and exceptional tasks • Prepare reporting and data analysis.
